C

COLOR_ACCENT - Static variable in class com.lulow.justtype.view.Theme
Primary accent color (teal).
COLOR_BASE - Static variable in class com.lulow.justtype.view.Theme
Base background color (near black).
COLOR_DANGER - Static variable in class com.lulow.justtype.view.Theme
Danger/error color (red).
COLOR_WHITE - Static variable in class com.lulow.justtype.view.Theme
Pure white, used for char labels and effects.
colorizeChars(String, String) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
Colors each character label based on whether the typed character matches the expected character at the same position.
com.lulow.justtype - module com.lulow.justtype

com.lulow.justtype.view.particles - package com.lulow.justtype.view.particles
 
CONFETTI_PALETTE - Static variable in class com.lulow.justtype.view.Theme
Color palette used for colorful confetti on the win screen.
CONFETTI_POP - Static variable in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioClips
Pop sound when confetti fires.
ConfettiFX - Class in com.lulow.justtype.view.particles
Particle emitter that fires confetti from the left and right edges of the screen.
ConfettiFX(Pane, double, double) - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.ConfettiFX
Creates the confetti emitter and starts its internal animation loop.
ConfettiParticle - Class in com.lulow.justtype.model.particles
A confetti particle that launches upward, rotates, and falls under gravity.
ConfettiParticle(double, double, int, Rectangle) - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.model.particles.ConfettiParticle
Creates a confetti particle.
CRITICAL_BEEP - Static variable in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioClips
Beep played when the timer reaches critical seconds.
CRUNCH - Static variable in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioClips
Sound effect for a correct answer.
